title: AI Prompt Engineering Masterclass
overview: Prompt Engineering AI revolution ka sabse important skill hai. Is course mein hum ChatGPT, Claude aur Gemini jaise Large Language Models (LLMs) ko optimize aur instruction design karna seekhenge step-by-step.
objectives: LLMs ke back-end process (next-token prediction) aur prompt logic ko samajhna.
Zero-shot, Few-shot aur Chain-of-Thought reasoning techniques implement karna.
Role-based prompts, outputs formatting and formatting validation rules structure karna.
Prompt libraries build karke online markets me service client sales design setup karna.

phases.title: Phase 1: Foundations (Week 1)
phases.desc: How LLMs work, prompt anatomy aur fundamental syntax rules.

phases.title: Phase 2: Core Techniques (Week 2)
phases.desc: Advanced reasoning triggers, zero-shot vs few-shot frameworks.

phases.title: Phase 3: Applied Systems & Monetization (Weeks 3-4)
phases.desc: Domain prompting, prompt libraries creation, and client onboarding pitch systems.

lessons.title: How LLMs Work & Introduction to Prompting
lessons.content:
Large Language Models (LLMs) database calculations systems par target complete predictive models standard me calculate work karte hain. LLMs next-token prediction logic implement karte hain.

### Key Concepts:
- **Tokens**: Characters / syllables mapped inside numerical database dictionary.
- **Next-Token Prediction**: Statistically computing matching tokens sequence.
- **Temperature**: Randomness parameters control (0 = factual, 1 = creative).
lessons.code:
SYSTEM: You are a helpful assistant.
USER: Explain LLM tokens under 50 words.
RESPONSE: ...
lessons.diagram: User Input -> Text tokenization -> Neural network calculation -> Next-token output prediction

quiz.question: LLMs responses me randomness and creativity parameters adjust system rules control by:
quiz.explanation: Temperature controls output probability distribution randomness configurations.

assignment.title: Create a temperature setting analysis workflow checklist
assignment.prompt: Document appropriate temperature settings configurations across 5 different real business use cases (like content creation vs legal query matching).

lessons.title: Implementing Zero-shot vs Few-shot prompts
lessons.content:
Data processing and categorisation standard pipelines build patterns configurations.

### Lookup Prompt strategies:
- **Zero-shot**: Directly instruct model without giving any template format example records.
- **Few-shot**: Supply 3-5 correct matching input/output samples data structure prior to prompt run.
lessons.code:
Review: 'Service is bad' -> Negative
Review: 'Fast shipping!' -> Positive
Review: 'Average setup' -> Neutral
Review: 'Confusing flow' ->
lessons.diagram: System instructions -> Examples list array -> User Query target -> Parsed Classifications

quiz.question: Few-shot prompting target design pattern help models to:
options: Understand complex structured schemas and styles formats natively
quiz.explanation: Examples teach formats patterns and output specifications natively to models.

assignment.title: Build a few-shot classifying prompt pipeline
assignment.prompt: Create an automated customer support message classifier classifying bug reports, feature requests and general questions.

lessons.title: Building structured prompts for real-world business content production
lessons.content: Large scale content pipelines require consistent prompt logic models. We will build reusable modular prompt templates with variables.
lessons.code:
PROMPT_TEMPLATE = """
SYSTEM: You are a copywriter.
TASK: Generate product copy for {product_name}.
BENEFITS: {benefits_list}.
TONE: {tone_value}.
"""
lessons.diagram: Prompt Template variables definition -> App injection parsing -> Consolidated prompt payload

quiz.question: Template prompting variables are parsed to ensure:
options: App automation integrations can format dynamic values rules
API rate limits checks are bypass rules
quiz.explanation: Variables enable software to programmatically fill values dynamic fields dynamically.

assignment.title: Generate business marketing campaign template cards
assignment.prompt: Write a reusable template generator prompt for drafting personalized cold B2B outreach email arrays.

lessons.title: Packaging prompts libraries for digital sales and freelance consultings
lessons.content: Prompt libraries creation, selling strategy systems package, pricing calculations rules and marketplaces showcase.
lessons.code:
FREELANCE_PACKAGE_DEAL = """
- Tested Prompts Collection: 15 items
- Implementation SOP document: 1
- Revision sessions: 2
"""
lessons.diagram: Tested Prompt assets creation -> Packaging (Checklist, SOP docs) -> Sales listing (Gumroad / Upwork client pitch)

quiz.question: Prompt engineering freelance pricing standard parameters should align targets on:
options: Business value metrics and automation time saved estimations
Line counts inside text files prompts
quiz.explanation: Value-based pricing maps direct revenue time-saving to prompt quality integrations.

assignment.title: Build a client pitch deck template and prompt profile description
assignment.prompt: Draft an Upwork proposal targeting a client who wants to build an automated email answering system.

capstone.title: Autonomous Customer Support AI Agent System Prompts Suite
capstone.description: Design end-to-end prompt engineering suite including system directives, RAG context inject structure, error fallbacks, and evaluation metrics rubric.

interview_questions.question: What is Chain of Thought prompting and when is it most effective?
interview_questions.answer: Chain of Thought (CoT) prompting instructs the model to break down logical reasoning into step-by-step steps before writing the final output. It is most effective in math solving, logical puzzle checks, code logic analysis, and complex semantic classification schemas.
